name: The Spread
desc: A comprehensive prediction market news and analysis platform. Aggregates markets, odds movements, and trading activity across prediction market platforms into a single destination.

name: Polygrapher
desc: Newsletter automation tool built for Polymarket. Pulls relevant markets and trades via APIs, lets editors customize content, optimizes HTML for email clients (Dub links, Cloudinary, minification). Goes out to 200k+ subscribers and drove $1M+ in new deposits in ~1 month.

name: Indexr
desc: Real-time searchable index of Polymarket markets and large trades. Syncs data every 5 minutes, flags whale traders (>$5K trades), tracks win rates, and filters by liquidity. Surfaces NewWhale, WinningTrader, and Contrarian behavioral tags.

name: Enflow
desc: System that allows police departments to build documentation workflows that they can automatically fill out through keyword extraction on daily logs via LLMs

name: PolyProfiler
desc: Trading analytics platform for Polymarket. Input any wallet address to generate calibration curves, price distribution histograms, trading timelines for biggest wins/losses, and a trader fingerprint radar chart showing risk tolerance, market diversity, and holding patterns.

name: SafeChoices
desc: Research on whether 'safe' prediction market bets (90%+ probability) can beat Treasury rates. Includes Polymarket API data collection, probability calibration analysis across confidence bands, and Monte Carlo simulations modeling single-fund, threshold, and multi-fund portfolio strategies. Dataset published on Kaggle.

name: PRDucer
desc: Developed for the Wharton School's Executive MBA classes. A step-by-step LLM assisted walkthrough of creating a technically sound PRD that can be given to Cursor, Claude Code, or any other AI assisted tool.

name: AIrchemedes
desc: A GPT-powered assistant for all steps of the entrepreneurial process. Takes a few keywords and walks you through building an executable product — from ideation to technical specification.

name: RushTracker
desc: A rush management system for Greek life organizations. Tracks prospective members through the rush process with a full frontend and backend.

name: Contact Scraper
desc: Ruby on Rails pipeline for scraping school contact information at scale. Multi-stage workflow with VPN rotation for rate limit handling, Sidekiq background jobs with Redis, and CSV export. Includes a Sidekiq web UI for job monitoring.

name: Traffic Simulation
desc: Traffic Simulation modeling 34th and Spruce St in Philadelphia and displaying the reduction in traffic violations caused by addition of speed bumps and traffic cameras

name: Highs and Lows
desc: A social media app to track the highs, lows, and ratings per day of you and your buddies. Inspired by a Hack4Impact tradition.

name: Squirrels without Morality
desc: Bringing Penn's favorite (and only) Cards against Humanity clone to the world wide web in both single player and multiplayer modes.

name: PennBTI
desc: An MBTI test built only with Penn-related questions + a matching feature (because what kind of founder would I be if I didn't try my hand at dating apps)

name: Presidential Debate Data
desc: Using the transcript to analyze the lexical, tonal, and topical patterns of the first Presidential debate of 2024!

name: Analyzing Music
desc: A combination of some Soundcloud & Genius scraping and a bit of Textblob to analyze what each artist's audeince values!
